name: branding-os
description: BrandingOS skills for building HTML/CSS slide assets and related branded visual outputs inside EntrelacOS.

interface.shortDescription: Create branded slide assets for BrandingOS.
interface.longDescription: Use BrandingOS to generate slide-based brand assets as self-contained HTML/CSS and render them into production-ready PNGs with strict viewport and typography rules.
defaultPrompt: Create branded slide assets for BrandingOS using HTML/CSS and render them to PNG.
